sys_security_acl.description: Allow read for all fields in x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance, for users with role x_153465_discovert.tasker_user, and if the ACL script returns true. DFCT0011821 - User in a Private Structure can see another Private Structure's Task DFCT0011824 - Faceted Search page SHOULD NOT display the "Restricted Task" of another OU in the search results.
sys_security_acl.name: x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance.*
